typecheck.command: xcodebuild build-for-testing -project OpenBurnBar.xcodeproj -scheme OpenBurnBar -destination "platform=macOS,arch=arm64" -clonedSourcePackagesDirPath .spm-cache -derivedDataPath .derived-data/ci-typecheck CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO

blockingIssues.description: `testVAL_EXEC_001_RunPhaseToPacketStatusMappingIsDeterministic` only exercises `.completed` and does not validate deterministic phase→status mapping across required terminal outcomes (`.failed` / `.cancelled`).
`testVAL_EXEC_012_RunJournalCapturesDeterministicReplayableExecutionTimeline` asserts final state only and does not verify run-journal event ordering or replay-consistency artifacts.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align focused validation command filters with `.factory/services.yaml` canonical names (`BurnBarRunServiceTests`, `BurnBarMissionControlServiceTests`, `BurnBarProviderRouterTests`) and require explicit handoff evidence for each listed focused validator.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review for `m9-single-node-e2e-thin-slice` flagged procedure drift: skill text currently uses `OpenBurnBar*` filter names while mission validators and contract commands are BurnBar-based; the reviewed handoff also omitted router-focused evidence despite `followedProcedure: true`.

rejectedObservations.observation: Document harness limitation for failed/cancelled terminal-phase sync in `.factory/library/`.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous-unverified: observation came from handoff commentary but was not independently reproduced during this scrutiny run.
